mapper.sql: id, url, authc, priority, remark, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.insert: insert into t_resource (id, url, authc, priority, remark, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{url,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{priority,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into t_resource
id,
url,
authc,
priority,
remark,
status,
create_by,
create_time,
update_by,
update_time,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{url,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{authc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{priority,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update t_resource
url = #{url,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
authc = #{authc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
priority = #{priority,jdbcType=INTEGER},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update t_resource set url = #{url,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, authc = #{authc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, priority = #{priority,jdbcType=INTEGER}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select * from t_resource
url = #{url,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
authc = #{authc,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
priority = #{priority,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
order by priority

select count(*) from t_resource
url = #{url,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
authc = #{authc,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
priority = #{priority,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND

select * from t_resource
url = #{model.url,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
authc = #{model.authc,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
priority = #{model.priority,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
remark = #{model.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
status = #{model.status,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
create_by = #{model.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
create_time = #{model.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
update_by = #{model.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
update_time = #{model.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
( authc like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or url like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or status like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
order by ${orderBy}
order by priority
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}

select count(*) from t_resource
url = #{model.url,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
authc = #{model.authc,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
priority = #{model.priority,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
remark = #{model.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
status = #{model.status,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
create_by = #{model.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
create_time = #{model.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
update_by = #{model.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
update_time = #{model.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
( authc like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or url like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or status like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
mapper.update:
insert into t_resource (id, priority, update_by, update_time) values
( #{item.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.priority,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE priority = VALUES(priority), update_by = VALUES(update_by), update_time = VALUES(update_time)
